en.extract:
The long-billed thrush (Zoothera monticola) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found from the Himalayas to Myanmar and Vietnam. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''long-billed thrush''' ('''''Zoothera monticola''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Turdidae]]. It is found from the [[Himalayas]] to Myanmar and Vietnam. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.

==Gallery==
<gallery>
File:Long-billed Thrush Kedarnath Musk Deer Sanctuary Uttarakhand India 25.11.2015.jpg|Specimen from [[Kedarnath Wildlife Sanctuary|Kedarnath Musk Deer Sanctuary]], [[Uttarakhand]], India.
File:Long-billed Thrush West Sikkim India 20.02.2016.jpg|From [[Khangchendzonga National Park]], [[West Sikkim]], India.
File:Zoothera monticola.jpg|Long-billed thrush, Arunachal Pradesh, India
File:Long-billed Thrush.jpg|In Phulchoki, [[Nepal]].
</gallery>

zh.extract:
大长嘴地鸫（学名：Zoothera monticola），是雀形目鸫科地鸫属的一种鸟类。其种加词“monticola”意为“生长在山地的”。


特征
大长嘴地鸫体重约126克，翼长约135.2毫米，嘴峰长约42毫米，喙宽度约5.9毫米，喙厚度约9.1毫米，跗蹠长约33毫米，尾长约85.2毫米。大长嘴地鸫在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在密集的高大树木组成的森林中，食性为肉食性，主要食物来源是陆生无脊椎动物。


亚种
Z. m. monticola：分布于北印度的喜马拉雅山至尼泊尔和缅甸东北部。
Z. m. atrata：分布于越南北部（北部地区）。
